title: Seller Hub Reports | eBay
notes: Allows sellers to download and upload data in CSV/XLS format, manage listings, download orders, and provide fulfillment information

title: Seller Hub | eBay
notes: Task management feature in Seller Hub showing suggested actions for listings and orders, including shipment deadlines and buyer messages

title: Offer to buyers
notes: Feature allowing sellers to send discount offers to buyers watching items or with items in cart, valid for 96 hours

title: News | Seller Center
notes: Monthly publication covering latest seller updates, new tools, tips and policy changes

title: eBay Store newsletters | eBay
notes: Email campaigns feature for eBay Store sellers to send newsletters to subscribers, followers, and past customers

title: Return shipping for sellers
notes: Policy requiring sellers to cover return shipping costs when items are damaged, faulty, or not as described

title: Seller performance overview | eBay
notes: Performance evaluation system assigning sellers to Below Standard, Above Standard, or Top Rated levels based on metrics like transaction defect rate and cases closed without seller resolution

title: Seller protections | eBay
notes: Protection policies against abusive buying behavior and events outside seller control, including negative feedback removal and payment dispute protections

title: eBay Refurbished Program | Seller Center
notes: Item condition indicating items restored to working order by seller or third party; being phased out in favor of official eBay Refurbished program in selected categories

title: Viewing and responding to feedback from buyers | eBay
notes: Feature allowing sellers to leave replies to buyer feedback and respond to buyer messages

title: Reconciling your eBay sales transactions | eBay
notes: Detailed CSV report showing all account activity including transaction dates, order numbers, fees, and payout details available through Payments tab in Seller Hub

title: Seller Updates | Seller Center
notes: Regular announcements of new features, policy changes, and platform improvements for sellers

title: Seller verification
notes: Identity verification process requiring SSN, EIN, or ITIN to confirm seller details and comply with applicable laws

title: Push Notifications | eBay
notes: Notification settings for selling activities including item sold, auctions, offers, and order updates via app, email, or SMS

title: Selling tools overview | eBay
notes: Tool for creating, managing and monitoring bulk listings; features now available in Seller Hub. Deprecated as of June 2021

title: Seller Hub | eBay
notes: Advanced bulk listing tool with inventory tracking, template storage, and automated relisting; features integrated into Seller Hub, subscription discontinued November 2021

title: Push Notifications | eBay
notes: Configurable alerts for selling activities available via eBay app, email, and SMS including item sold, auctions, and order updates

title: Setting buyer requirements | eBay
notes: Settings for managing seller account preferences including buyer requirements, multi-quantity listings, and business policies

title: Selling limits | eBay
notes: Limits on number and value of items sellers can list, category-specific restrictions, and prohibited items policies

title: Selling is now even easier with AI | eBay.com
notes: AI-powered features including automated item descriptions, background enhancement, AI assistant for buyer messages, and bulk listing tool

title: Coded coupons | Seller Center
notes: Feature for Store subscribers to create and send discount coupons to specific buyer groups or individual buyers

title: Sending an invoice and combining payments | eBay
notes: Feature allowing sellers to send or revise invoices for combining purchases, changing shipping charges, or sending payment reminders

title: Messages | eBay
notes: Messaging system for communication between buyers and sellers before and after purchases

title: Adding Best Offer to your listing and sending offers to buyers | eBay
notes: Feature allowing sellers to send discount offers to the 30 most recent interested buyers, valid for 96 hours

title: Refunding buyers | eBay
notes: Feature to issue full or partial refunds to buyers within 90 days of original transaction through Seller Hub or My eBay

notes: eBay payment services for France market, processing payments end-to-end with funds deposited directly to seller bank accounts

title: Share to social | Seller Center
notes: Feature allowing sellers to share listings on social media platforms with unique tracking links that provide final value fee credits for resulting sales

title: Terms and Conditions | eBay
notes: Sharing functionality for buyers and sellers to share listings via social media, email, or other channels

title: Shill bidding policy | eBay
notes: Policy prohibiting bidding on own items or having associates bid to artificially increase price or desirability

title: Changing the address on your eBay account | eBay
notes: Setting for managing the address from which items are shipped, distinct from return address; only ZIP code displays on shipping labels

title: Tracking your item | eBay
notes: Tracking and confirmation system for shipments including tracking numbers, delivery dates, and signature confirmation requirements

title: Shipping Calculator | eBay
notes: Tool for calculating shipping costs based on package details, buyer location, and delivery service; supports USPS, UPS, and FedEx

title: Shipping rates for buyers | eBay
notes: Display of shipping charges shown separately from item cost in listings, calculated based on buyer location for calculated shipping

title: Shipping discounts | eBay
notes: Discounts available through eBay Labels averaging 33% off retail rates, plus promotional and combined shipping discounts

title: Shipping discounts | Seller Center
notes: Tool for Store subscribers to offer time-bound or conditional free shipping and combined shipping discounts to buyers

title: Printing and canceling shipping labels | eBay
notes: Service for creating and printing discounted shipping labels for FedEx, UPS, or USPS with QR code option for label-free drop-off

title: Shipping policy | eBay
notes: Policies governing international shipping restrictions, weight limits, high-value item requirements, and prohibited items for shipping

title: eBay International Shipping program
notes: Indicator showing which countries seller ships to; eBay International Shipping makes items available to buyers in almost 200 countries

title: Shop by Category | eBay
notes: Main category browsing page organizing items into major categories including Motors, Electronics, Collectibles, Fashion, Home & Garden, and more

title: Shipping Discounts
notes: International version of shipping discounts documentation covering eBay Labels discounted rates and promotional shipping options

notes: International documentation for Seller Hub Reports feature allowing download and upload of data in CSV/XLS format

notes: International documentation for seller performance evaluation system and seller level requirements
